matches.x: God to be praised. Pa ye the Lord. Sing unto the Lord a new song, and his praise in the congregation of saints.

Sing unto the Lord a new song. Singing a new song unto the Lord is mentioned ten times in the scriptures (see, for example, Ps. 40:3; 98:1; 149:1; Rev. 5:9; 14:3; D&C 84:98). Each time the song is one of praise. Such songs appear to be called new because they praise the Lord for new works of glory and blessing. The Lord commands the entire earth to sing a new song unto him. (Donald W. Parry, Jay…
